title: Deepgrounds Server Tools
description: The ability to add players as simple moderators, combat log prevention, login commands, Elytra balance, more.
body:
# Deepgrounds Moderator Commands
By initiating the command `/deepgrounds` you can see a variety of commands that will allow you to change your server as you wish.


```
/deepgrounds moderator
```
The following branch of commands allows for you to `add`, `remove`, `check` and `list` your moderators.

The moderators are capable of `/moderator warn <target_player> <reason>`, which adds the warn to the world's database. You can check all the reasons players have been warned with by `/moderator check crimes_list <target_player>`, they can also check the warn count with `/moderator check warn_count <target_player>`.

![Player getting warned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/182e2435cf075fe3649bae76f8e0007f2116ace2.png)

**The warn system automatically bans players that have 10 or higher amount of warns.**

When a player is warned, every player in the whole server will be notified, this is so that they are also aware of the consequences of breaking your rules. Upon warning a player, a 2nd chat message will also be shown to all players in the server, reminding them that reaching 10 warns will cause a ban.

![Checking the warn reasons of a player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/256eb171772830388189feb93a2c60133de9b22e.png)

Currently, this limit cannot be changed, I have plans to make it configurable in the future.

However, if your moderators warn people by mistake, they can also remove warns with the following command `/moderator unwarn <target_player>` which removes 1 warn off of them. The amount of warns that get removed, and the amount of warn count that gets added will be configurable in the future. 

And if you'd like to wipe the crimes history of a player, a moderator can do `/moderator wipe_crime_history <target_player>`.

![Muted player unable to speak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b80179676a338fa8c4a0477c822bfdeafe1d066.png)

Additionally, if a player is speaking in a very disturbing manner, a moderator can do `/moderator mute <target_player>`, the mute is counted through a potion effect, however drinking milk (or any other modded item that removes potion effects), disconnecting, dying will cause the potion to be re-inflicted. The muted players also cannot place signs or write on books. They can still communicate through building structures, however at that point is when warns/auto-ban comes in.

![Icon for being muted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7360195699fd20525cb8a98775ee4b90e3b62e18.png)

Bonus little fun tool given to moderators is that they can `/moderator strike_lightning <target_player>`. However this has 30 minutes worth of cooldown, 20 block distance limit, and a hunger requirement so that it isn't used for pvp advantage. Just for funzies, if the weather is thundering, the 20 block distance limit gets removed!

** **
# Deepgrounds Server Commands

```
/deepgrounds server player_actions repair_armor <target_player> <amount>
```
This command can be used to repair all parts of a player's armor by a certain amount. This is especially useful if a rulebreaker was trolling and constantly respawning to hit players that have armor, significantly reducing their armor, after getting rid of the rulebreaker, you will need a tool to remove the permanent damage from armors. And not all armors are repairable, some of the modded ones will require you to use this command to repair them. Upon repairing their amor, they will be notified of this action.

```/deepgrounds server dimensions <end|nether>```
This is a simple command that allows you to enable/disable both The Nether and The End, incase you ever need to.

```/deepgrounds server login_commands <info|modify>```
This is one of my favorite commands in this mod, it basically allows you to create "login commands" where every time a player enters the server for the first time "a newbie" it triggers all of these commands directly at their place. The command being initiated directly at their place allows you to use `@p` to target them, meaning you can add them to teams, give them items, and a bunch of cool little stuff. And you can test this by resetting a player's first-time-login data (which you can also do within the same command).

```/deepgrounds server combat pvp <combat_timer|combat_log_prevention|styles>```
You can enable combat log prevention, where if a player leaves during the combat timer you decide, they will be considered killed. There is also a visual warning for this when they open their pause menu during PvP.

![Combat Log Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42760610ecf244d402eeaafbe541e53acdd8f90c_0.webp)
You can also enable/disable or nerf certain styles of PvP, for example, you can nerf the Elytra fireworks by adding a custom cooldown, or nerf Crystal PvP by adding a cooldown to Crystals. However this part of this command seems a bit buggy, I will fix it in the future.

** **

# Deepgrounds Recipes
Deepgrounds adds a recipe to the Elytra to prevent it from massacring the server economy.

### The Elytra Recipe

![Elytra Recipe consisting of 6 Osmotic Membranes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca34f1764e1af9edd48635dfe0c03e7e9744e5d3.png)

In order to craft it, **6 Osmotic Membranes** are required.

And to craft these:

![Osmotic Membrane Recipe consisting of 8 Phantom Membranes and a Bottle Of Void](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28400f7ec4e7678426e190fbb25f1993ad637546.png)

A **Bottle of Void** is required for this.

To craft that:

![Reinforced Bottle Recipe consisting of a Bottle and 4 Iron Ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a905236beda2bfc37d4a4c561756feadea6572e0.png)

After crafting a **Reinforced Bottle**, go to **The End** and right click the air, to acquire A **Bottle Of Void**, which you can use to craft the required items for the Elytra.

#

### Nametag Recipe

This was made just for the convenience of our players, considering the name tag was already made craftable in the later versions. I struggled finding a mod that added a name tag recipe, so I decided to add it in with this mod as well.

![Name Tag Recipe consisting of a Paper, Iron Nugget and a Gold Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c0888c33ad17c52f10f9a9fc8f13ce1e4240eb3.png)

** **

# Summarization

This mod is to generally make my life easier as a server owner in minecraft, if you feel like any of these would be helpful in your server, feel free to download the mod. If you have any suggestions to the mod, you can join my discord use my channel for mod bug reports.
